'''nganava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:focimeter|focimeter]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-n-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:focimeter|focimeter]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| nganava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngænævæth|ngænævæth]] || [[word:ngænævæj|ngænævæj]] || [[word:ngænævæsh|ngænævæsh]] || [[word:ngænævæ|ngænævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngananavath|ngananavath]] || [[word:ngananavaj|ngananavaj]] || [[word:ngananavash|ngananavash]] || [[word:ngananava|ngananava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:nganavath|nganavath]] || [[word:nganavaj|nganavaj]] || [[word:nganavash|nganavash]] || [[word:nganava|nganava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:nganafvath|nganafvath]] || [[word:nganafvaj|nganafvaj]] || [[word:nganafvash|nganafvash]] || [[word:nganafvaf|nganafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:nganavatha|nganavatha]] || [[word:nganavaja|nganavaja]] || [[word:nganavasha|nganavasha]] || [[word:nganavaka|nganavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:nganavath|nganavath]] || [[word:nganavaj|nganavaj]] || [[word:nganavash|nganavash]] || [[word:nganava|nganava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:nganavathal|nganavathal]] || [[word:nganavajal|nganavajal]] || [[word:nganavashal|nganavashal]] || [[word:nganavakal|nganavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:nganavathatha|nganavathatha]] || [[word:nganavajaja|nganavajaja]] || [[word:nganavashasha|nganavashasha]] || [[word:nganavaka|nganavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:nganavathan|nganavathan]] || [[word:nganavajan|nganavajan]] || [[word:nganavashan|nganavashan]] || [[word:nganavakan|nganavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:nganavathaoro|nganavathaoro]] || [[word:nganavajaoro|nganavajaoro]] || [[word:nganavashaoro|nganavashaoro]] || [[word:nganavakaoro|nganavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
